entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop affected by Phytophthora blight disease

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA BLIGHT
entities.description: An emerging disease of pigeonpea caused by Phytophthora cajani

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA CAJANI
entities.description: The oomycete pathogen that causes Phytophthora blight in pigeonpea

entities.name: ZOOSPORE SCREENING
entities.description: A standardized technique used to screen pigeonpea germplasm for resistance to Phytophthora blight

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea lines to withstand or inhibit the effects of Phytophthora blight

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of analyzing P. cajani isolates culturally, morphologically, and at the molecular level

entities.name: INTEGRATED DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A strategy developed to manage and control Phytophthora blight using multiple methods

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to inhibit the growth of fungi and oomycetes like P. cajani

entities.name: ACROBAT
entities.description: A specific fungicide found to be effective in inhibiting the mycelial growth of P. cajani

entities.name: RIDOMIL GOLD
entities.description: A fungicide effective in minimizing disease incidence in pigeonpea

entities.name: INDOFIL M 45
entities.description: A fungicide effective in minimizing disease incidence in pigeonpea

entities.name: CURZATE M8
entities.description: A fungicide effective in minimizing disease incidence in pigeonpea

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of fungicides to seeds to prevent disease

entities.name: SOIL DRENCH
entities.description: The application of fungicides to the soil to prevent disease
